title: Interfaceless
description: A Faithless Addon that integrates a lot of UI mods.
body:
This pack is designed to add Faithless support to the multiple utility/ui mods. Now you can enjoy all the fun textures of Faithless without having it clash with JAPPA textures!

Here are the list of mods currently supported

- Cosmetic Armor: https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor
- Inventory Management: https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management
- Polymorph: https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph
- ShulkerBoxTooltip: https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip
- Trinkets: https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets
- Simple Voice Chat: https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat


PLANNED SUPPORT:
- Cherished Worlds
- Crafting Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Bedrockify


NOTE: If using Fabric/Quilt, DO NOT USE the latest version, try using Fabric API 0.88.1 and older if possible.

[Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) is created by [StitchSprites](https://modrinth.com/user/StitchSprites); Check out their other [PROJECTS](https://linktr.ee/stitch.sprites)
